'''dawufu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:nocireceptor|nocireceptor]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| d-w-f
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:nocireceptor|nocireceptor]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| dawufu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:dæwifith|dæwifith]] || [[word:dæwifij|dæwifij]] || [[word:dæwifish|dæwifish]] || [[word:dæwifi|dæwifi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:dawuwufuth|dawuwufuth]] || [[word:dawuwufuj|dawuwufuj]] || [[word:dawuwufush|dawuwufush]] || [[word:dawuwufu|dawuwufu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:dawufuth|dawufuth]] || [[word:dawufuj|dawufuj]] || [[word:dawufush|dawufush]] || [[word:dawufu|dawufu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:dawuffuth|dawuffuth]] || [[word:dawuffuj|dawuffuj]] || [[word:dawuffush|dawuffush]] || [[word:dawuffuf|dawuffuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:dawufuthu|dawufuthu]] || [[word:dawufuju|dawufuju]] || [[word:dawufushu|dawufushu]] || [[word:dawufuku|dawufuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:dawufuth|dawufuth]] || [[word:dawufuj|dawufuj]] || [[word:dawufush|dawufush]] || [[word:dawufu|dawufu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:dawufuthul|dawufuthul]] || [[word:dawufujul|dawufujul]] || [[word:dawufushul|dawufushul]] || [[word:dawufukul|dawufukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:dawufuthuthu|dawufuthuthu]] || [[word:dawufujuju|dawufujuju]] || [[word:dawufushushu|dawufushushu]] || [[word:dawufuku|dawufuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:dawufuthun|dawufuthun]] || [[word:dawufujun|dawufujun]] || [[word:dawufushun|dawufushun]] || [[word:dawufukun|dawufukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:dawufuthuoro|dawufuthuoro]] || [[word:dawufujuoro|dawufujuoro]] || [[word:dawufushuoro|dawufushuoro]] || [[word:dawufukuoro|dawufukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|d03cc2d}}
